potential_hallucinations.requirement: The system shall schedule and assign a flight number when a new flight is created.
The system shall change the flight status to 'on journey' once it takes off.
The system shall mark the flight as inactive and record it as a past record upon landing.
The system shall remove inactive flights over time.

missing_requirements.evidence_quote: At this point, everything is prepared, but the flight hasn’t started yet.
missing_requirements.suggested_requirement: The system shall ensure that all preparations are completed before marking a new flight as scheduled.

hallucinations.rewritten_requirement: The system shall remove inactive flights over time.
hallucinations.reason: There is no mention in the source text about removing inactive flights over time. The source text only mentions that information is removed when the flight is no longer important.

ambiguities.rewritten_requirement: The system shall mark the flight as inactive and record it as a past record upon landing.
ambiguities.reason: The source text does not specify that flights are recorded as past records upon landing. It only states that they become part of past records after landing.
